title: Bare Bones Mini Tool
description: Mini tools texturepack in barebone style
body:
ABOUT:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Turns your big tools into small tools in the barebones style. Nothing else to say.
Credits to Rastabumbapasta for the old icon. 
Update : im making a small mace version addon for this pack (it might be out when youre reading this).
*Doesnt need any mods*

- Texture changed :
- Axe (All kinds)
- Sword (All kinds) 
- Dager Sword : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-dager](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-dager)
- Pickaxe (All kinds)
- Hoe (All kinds)
- Shovel (All kinds)
- Bow And Crossbows
- Trident
- Mace : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-small-mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-small-mace)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93b329e51aca58ed1e9fe98acfbada7c9ccea47.png)
